query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query {{{filter}}}
//| where execution_duration_ms > 30000
//not query_type = view*
not query_type = sumo*
| where scanned_partition_count >3 
| where data_scanned_bytes > ({{min_scan_gb_per_search}} * 1G)

| sum(data_scanned_bytes) as bytes,count as searches by user_name,scanned_partition_count //,query_type
| where bytes > 10000000000
| bytes /1024/1024/1024 as scan_gb | fields -bytes
| ceil(scanned_partition_count/5) * 5 as part_range
| total searches as total_searches by user_name,part_range
| concat(toint(part_range),": ",toint(total_searches)) as range_searches
| sort user_name,part_range
| values(range_searches) as %"range: num_searches",sum(scan_gb) as total_scan_gb,sum(searches) as total_searches by user_name
| replace(%"range: num_searches","\n","  ") as %"range: num_searches"
| sort total_scan_gb
| round(total_scan_gb / 1024,2) as total_scan_tb
| round(total_scan_gb) as total_scan_gb
| round(total_scan_gb / total_searches,1) as gb_per_search

sources.dashboardDescription: A dashboard for viewing and optimizing high scan and poor performing searches in a Sumo Logic account using Search Audit logs.
sources.panelTitle: Users Scanning > 3 Partitions and > 10GB. Could benefit from training to add index
